name: AIQA AGENT - Test Case Creator Agent
description: Transforms Jira or Azure DevOps user stories into reusable manual and automated test cases. Uses a prompt template plus configurable chat model. OpenAI-compatible providers can use OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio base URLs. Anthropic users can swap the chat model component in LangFlow.

providerSupport: LM Studio via local OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Anthropic by replacing the chat model node

sampleInput.story: As a shopper I can apply a coupon during checkout so that my order total is discounted.
sampleInput.acceptanceCriteria: Valid coupons discount cart total. Expired coupons show an error. One coupon can be applied per order.

data.label: Test Case Creator Agent Input

data.template:
You are a senior test design engineer. Produce precise, executable test cases from requirements. Keep each case traceable to a requirement or assumption.

Project: Test Case Creator Agent
Objective: Turn requirement text into high-coverage positive, negative, edge, and regression cases with consistent formatting.
Primary use case: A tester pastes a user story or Jira payload and receives prioritized test cases ready for TestRail, Zephyr, Gherkin, or JSON export.

Required task:
Create test cases from the supplied story. Include preconditions, steps, expected results, test data, priority, type, automation candidate flag, and traceability references. Also list missing acceptance criteria.

Required output:
- Start with an executive summary.
- Include assumptions and missing information.
- Provide concrete QA artifacts that can be copied into a real workflow.
- Include an implementation checklist.
- Return Markdown first, then a compact JSON summary.

User input:
{project_input}

data.openai_api_base_note: Set base URL for Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio when using OpenAI-compatible mode.
